title: imagebuildah: fix nil deref
body:
Make sure that the CommonBuildOpts field is set when nil.
Found the nil deref while working in Podman.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>
